data.narrative: The student implemented a complete CRUD API surface and a public redirect endpoint using a prefixed routing strategy. They verified functionality with reproducible API requests, reproduced validation failures, and confirmed that unsafe URL schemes were rejected before redirecting.

dimension_scores.observation: Selected the prefixed redirect route to isolate public redirects from API routes.
dimension_scores.evidence: Chose /r/<code> instead of a root-level redirect.

dimension_scores.observation: Reproduced validation failures before implementing and verifying the fix.
dimension_scores.evidence: Verified javascript: and data: URLs returned HTTP 400.

dimension_scores.observation: Protected the API from unsafe redirect targets.
dimension_scores.evidence: Accepted only http:// and https:// schemes.

dimension_scores.observation: Implemented expiration handling and verified redirect behavior.
dimension_scores.evidence: Confirmed valid redirects return HTTP 302 and expired links return HTTP 410.

dimension_scores.observation: Explained routing decisions and validation behavior clearly.
dimension_scores.evidence: Provided reasoning for route isolation and API verification.

strengths: Verified API behavior with reproducible requests before considering the module complete.
data.recommendation: Continue applying the same verification-first approach when authentication and authorization are introduced.

public_evidence.student_action: Implemented CRUD routes and a prefixed public redirect endpoint.
public_evidence.technical_detail: POST /links, GET /links, GET /links/:id, GET /r/:code with URL validation and expiration handling.
public_evidence.proof: Verified HTTP 302 redirects for valid links and HTTP 400 responses for invalid URL schemes.
public_evidence.ability: Can build and verify a secure API surface.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Demonstrates practical API design, validation, routing, and testing.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Used a prefixed redirect route to avoid collisions.
Rejected unsafe URL schemes before persistence.

learning_style_signals: Learns effectively through hands-on verification and iterative debugging.
